title: Swearishly Optimized
description: Enjoy Seamingless perfomance extracting 33 percent more perfomance than Vulkanmod
body:
Swearishly Optimized:
Swearishly optimized is An Specialized Modpack Containing only 10 mods. And dont worry! these mods are not like you increase your render distance and ur fps instalntly vanish. Higher render distances like 32 chunks (My default render distance) renders an high level of details and to handle these details Java or Minecraft Has to make A lott of trash with is called Garbage to collect these garbage u must need an very efficient garbage collector like Shendoah or ZGC Generational but they both uses More ram and cpu resources. like bruh use an Garbage collector only to lose fps and higher game stalls? Nah bro. i reccomend an stable GC(Garbage collector) like G1GC. alongside i prefer to you huys have this JVM arguement in you JVM arguements box:
 -Xms4G -Xmx4G -XX:+UnlockExperimentalVMOptions -XX:+UseG1GC -XX:MaxGCPauseMillis=50 -XX:G1NewSizePercent=35 -XX:G1MaxNewSizePercent=60 -XX:G1ReservePercent=20 -XX:G1HeapRegionSize=32M -XX:G1HeapWastePercent=5 -XX:G1MixedGCCountTarget=4 -XX:InitiatingHeapOccupancyPercent=15 -XX:G1MixedGCLiveThresholdPercent=90 -XX:G1RSetUpdatingPauseTimePercent=5 -XX:SurvivorRatio=32 -XX:+PerfDisableSharedMem -XX:MaxTenuringThreshold=1 -XX:+AlwaysPreTouch -Dlog4j.configurationFile=silent_logs.xml 
This is an hihgly optimized JVM only for perfomance. And this modpack Turns off unnessecery logs writing that vanilla does. Saving a tons of IO power that helps higher chunk generation speed. And also i reccomend allocating 4 gb ram as its only like 10 mods
